description:
Preserve Image Aspect Ratios Across All Components

Audit and fix all image implementations throughout the application to ensure aspect ratios are maintained during resize operations and responsive layout changes.

Requirements:
- Fix the confirmed aspect ratio issue in the about-preview-section component
- Conduct a comprehensive audit of all image elements across the entire codebase
- Identify instances where images are stretched, squashed, or distorted
- Implement proper CSS properties (object-fit, aspect-ratio) to preserve original proportions
- Ensure images maintain correct aspect ratios across all viewport sizes and breakpoints
- Test images in various containers (flex, grid, fixed width, responsive containers)
- Handle both img tags and background images appropriately
- Verify behavior during browser window resizing and orientation changes
- Consider edge cases like very wide/tall images and loading states
- Document the correct pattern for image usage to prevent future issues
